name: method
value: Do not fit a physical CdA from sparse powered GPS deceleration alone. Use wind-tunnel/paper rows for physical drag scale, flight-log rows for envelope feasibility, and keep any gameplay damping separate.
note: Physical drag and stability/gameplay damping should remain separate model surfaces.
